properties.entry: INSERT INTO users (user_id, password, email, name, phone) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE name = ? AND email = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE user_id = ? AND name = ? AND email = ?
UPDATE users SET password = ? WHERE user_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE user_id = ? AND name = ? AND email = ?
UPDATE users SET password = ? WHERE user_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users WHERE user_id = ? AND password = ?
